arts.ttl: Liverpool's stance on selling club to Elon Musk as billionaire's dad reveals interest
arts.sum: Liverpool have had no contact from Elon Musk and Fenway Sports Group have no interest in selling the club - after it emerged that the billionaire is interested in buying the club

arts.ttl: Elon Musk stance on purchasing Liverpool revealed as his father addresses rumours
arts.sum: Elon Musk has been rumoured with a potential purchase of Liverpool

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold contract latest: Has Arne Slot lost defender to Real Madrid after shock performance in Manchester United draw?
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is under increasing scrutiny following his performance against Manchester United last Sunday amidst speculation he is set to join Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Manchester United: Premier League title race blow for Arne Slot as Ruben Amorim's side give Arsenal boost
arts.sum: Liverpool's performance against Manchester United in the Premier League on Sunday is a cause for concern for boss Arne Slot, as the Dutchman looks to fend off Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans unite in response to Elon Musk's desire to buy the Premier League leaders as supporters claim he would 'wipe away the club's identity'
arts.sum: Musk's father Errol was quizzed about his son - who is the richest man in the world with an estimated wealth of worth an estimated £334billion - reportedly having interest in purchasing the club.

arts.ttl: Antonin Kinsky decision made as £21m man returns: Tottenham predicted XI v Liverpool

arts.ttl: Antonin Kinsky says he is ‘ready’ to start vs Liverpool if Spurs need him
arts.sum: Antonin Kinsky has spoken about the emotions that went through his mind as he made a big switch to Tottenham Hotspur and has admitted that... The post Antonin Kinsky says he is ‘ready’ to start vs Liverpool if Spurs need him appeared first on Spurs Web.

arts.ttl: Elon Musk has expressed interest in buying English soccer club Liverpool, his father says
arts.sum: “Oh yes, but that doesn’t mean he’s buying it,” Errol Musk said. Liverpool, which leads by the Premier League and Champions League this season, did not have an immediate comment.

arts.ttl: Saudi-US brothers' £150m offer may be critical as Daniel Levy seeks Tottenham investment bidding war
Elon Musk would be interested in buying Liverpool FC, claims father
arts.sum: ‘He would like to yes, obviously. Anybody would want to’ Musk Sr says there is family connection to the city The father of the world’s richest man, Elon Musk, claims his son would be interested in buying Liverpool FC. Fenway Sports Group, which added the Reds to their sporting portfolio in 2010, has looked for external investment in the past but at no point has a full sale been seriously considered. Nevertheless, Errol Musk was asked whether his son had his eye on Anfield. Continue reading...
